title: Trnava、Trnava Region — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Trnava、Trnava Regionの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TrnavaはTrnava Regionにある人口64,735の都市です。Little Rome of Slovakia, a city of beautiful Baroque churches and religious architecture, with a historic old town and a growing automotive and electronics industry.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
